label: no
cot_prefix: Okay, I need to figure out how a typical person would answer the question about causation. The question is: Did the administrative assistant cause the problem (of there being no pens left on the receptionist's desk)? Let me first understand the scenario: 1. The receptionist in the philosophy department keeps a stock of pens. 2. Only administrative assistants are allowed to take the pens. 3. Faculty members (like Professor Smith) are supposed to buy their own pens. 4. Administrative assistants typically take the pens (as they're allowed). 5. Faculty members typically also take the pens (which is against the rules). 6. The receptionist has sent reminders to faculty members to stop taking pens. 7. On Monday morning, an administrative assistant sees Professor Smith and both take pens from the desk. 8. Later that day, the receptionist has a problem - there are no pens left on her desk. 9.
